summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform and embedded firmware for input devices, alongside research into ML models for trading and computer vision. Also maintained a Windows Explorer tagging utility and an Android TTS app.

items.title: SaaS crypto algo trading platform
items.description: Polished the web build and authentication system for the AI-driven trading platform.

items.title: Minimal AutoHotKey alternative
items.description: Started building a lightweight input automation tool with interception support.

items.title: Mouse and keyboard emulation firmware
items.description: Iterated on ESP32-S3 firmware for feature-rich HID emulation.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a kernel-level input capture and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Fixed encoding issues for file metadata in Windows Explorer.

items.title: Android TTS implementation
items.description: Worked on voice engine integration and speech synthesis features for the Android TTS app.

items.title: CV and input emulation project
items.description: Refined computer vision models and input emulation logic for the utility.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware
items.description: Expanded firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app.

items.title: SaaS crypto algo trading platform
items.description: Built out proxy infrastructure, billing models, and deployment pipelines for the trading platform.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware
items.description: Developed map and knowledge base applications for custom e-reader firmware.

items.title: Proxy client with XHTTP support
items.description: Updated a proxy client fork with new transport protocol support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Experimented with neural network architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: LLM with phone use capabilities
items.description: Built out sub-agent delegation and model routing for an on-device LLM assistant.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for E-ink devices.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Configured CI/CD pipelines and Microsoft Store publishing for the file tagging tool.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded language support and code analysis features for the codebase indexing tool.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup with LSP and Treesitter.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a minimalistic, on-host labeling tool for object detection datasets.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games.

items.title: n8n automation node
items.description: Updated an n8n node for AI coding agent integration.

items.title: Android task management app
items.description: Improved the user experience for a personal task management application.

items.title: Autonomous multi-session AI coding
items.description: Built features for an autonomous AI coding tool with worktree management.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Worked on a Telegram bot for monitoring and managing trading bots.

items.title: Trading bot monitoring app
items.description: Developed a mobile UI for monitoring automated trading strategies.

items.title: Telegram content aggregation
items.description: Built a tool for aggregating and forwarding content from Telegram channels.

items.title: Automated trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies.
